metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Students develop professional skills in print and digital graphic production, including prepress processes, color management, and production workflows. This course emphasizes technical proficiency in industry-standard tools and processes, culminating in portfolio development.
metadata.general_description: Professional print and digital production, prepress processes, color management, and portfolio development.

big_ideas.statement: Graphic production requires understanding design principles, production workflows, and technical specifications
big_ideas.elaboration: Successful production integrates aesthetic design with technical knowledge of printing, color, and file formats.

big_ideas.statement: Prepress processes ensure that designs are accurately reproduced according to specifications
big_ideas.elaboration: Color separation, file preparation, and quality checking are essential to achieving desired production results.

big_ideas.statement: Color management ensures consistent appearance across design, proof, and final production
big_ideas.elaboration: Understanding color spaces, profiles, and calibration ensures colors are reproduced accurately.

big_ideas.statement: Professional graphic production requires attention to detail, quality standards, and client communication
big_ideas.elaboration: Production professionals ensure designs meet specifications while communicating with designers and clients.

competencies.raw: Design for print with production specifications in mind
i_can_statements: I can design for different print formats and substrates
I can plan color separations and CMYK conversion
I can design with bleed, trim, and safe areas
I can create print-ready artwork

competencies.raw: Design for digital platforms with technical requirements
i_can_statements: I can design for screen resolutions and formats
I can optimize designs for web and mobile
I can plan responsive and adaptive designs
I can create digital-ready assets
I can plan prepress processes
I can develop color management workflows
I can create quality assurance procedures
I can design efficient production systems

competencies.raw: Design marketing materials and branded collateral
i_can_statements: I can design cohesive visual identity systems
I can create branded marketing materials
I can plan multi-piece campaigns
I can maintain brand consistency

competencies.raw: Apply graphic design software to create production-ready artwork
i_can_statements: I can use professional design software fluently
I can create accurate technical artwork
I can manage colors and color profiles
I can prepare files for output

competencies.raw: Apply prepress processes and color separation techniques
i_can_statements: I can convert colors to production color spaces
I can create separations for print
I can prepare digital proofs
I can verify and correct artwork

competencies.raw: Apply file management and workflow procedures
i_can_statements: I can organize and manage production files
I can implement naming conventions and versions
I can prepare files for different output methods
I can document specifications and instructions

competencies.raw: Apply quality control and production oversight
i_can_statements: I can inspect and verify digital proofs
I can identify and correct production errors
I can communicate with production teams
I can ensure quality standards

competencies.raw: Use professional graphic design software and tools
i_can_statements: I can use vector and raster design applications
I can use page layout applications
I can use photo editing and enhancement tools
I can integrate various software tools

competencies.raw: Use color management and proofing technology
i_can_statements: I can use color management systems
I can work with ICC color profiles
I can create digital and physical proofs
I can calibrate monitors and devices
I can use digital output devices
I can understand print production methods
I can use scanning and image capture
I can work with production equipment

competencies.raw: Use project management and documentation systems
i_can_statements: I can use project management tools
I can create digital documentation
I can use asset management systems
I can track production progress
